name: Traffic Jam Simulator
short_description: Super casual 3D low-poly style mini game
detailed_description:
You’ve probably encountered traffic jams in real life, and this game simulates those situations. You play as a traffic officer directing vehicles to move and get them back on the road. Solve various traffic jam scenarios and relax!

  • Various obstacles will block vehicle movement, and each obstacle has unique collision effects.

  • There are three different vehicle sizes that need to be moved.

  • A unique time-limit system where you need to complete the game objectives within the given time.

Game Controls: Drag the vehicles with the mouse. To adjust the camera view, you can use "W, A, S, D" and the mouse wheel.

supported_languages:
English*, German*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
